music_hall.title: Build a music hall in your settlement — a dedicated space with jukebox, instruments, and seating

etched_collection.title: Engrave 5 different Etched music discs — give the settlement a full music rotation

subtitle.text: A music hall is permanent. It says: we intend to stay, and we intend to have music while we do.

description: The music hall is the cultural center of your settlement.
It does not need to be large — it needs to be intentional.
Recommended design:
- Ground floor: jukebox with disc selection, seating from vanilla blocks
- Instrument stands: Xerca instruments for manual play
- Wall display: Exposure photographs of the adventure
- Adjacent wine rack: Vinery wine storage
5 Etched discs give the settlement a full rotation.
The Etched engraving system lets you source any audio.
Choose music that fits the chapter you are in.
The kingdom you built in Ch12 now has:
An army (Villager Recruits).
A road network (Via Romana).
An economy (Numismatics + Bountiful).
A wine cellar (Vinery).
A music hall (Etched + Xerca).
This is not a survival base anymore.
This is a civilization.
→ Build a dedicated music hall [check]
→ Engrave 5 Etched discs [check]
